title: Curved Wall Fitout for James Lane — Moore Park
summary: Curved commercial fitout for James Lane in Moore Park, showing custom fabrication, framing and large-format display joinery.
heroAlt: James Lane Moore Park curved wall fitout and retail display installation
overview: This James Lane Moore Park fitout broadens the project mix beyond residential work and shows our ability to handle curved construction, display joinery and larger-format assembly. The job is valuable because the detailing, setting out and build sequence are very different from a standard room-by-room home renovation.

spaces.title: Commercial fitout
spaces.text: A curved feature fitout fabricated and assembled for the James Lane showroom, with the framing, lining and display wall handled as one commercial joinery package.
spaces.alt: Moore Park curved commercial fitout detail

outcome: The finished display wall and showroom elements show a cleaner commercial outcome with the curvature and lining resolved properly, not treated as a rough construction exercise.
ctaText: Planning a bespoke retail, display or curved joinery scope in Moore Park or Sydney? Send through the brief and we can help review the feasibility.
